---
description: Golden-root fixture for the wiki adapter's looksLikeRoot conformance gate (chunk-2 WI-2.1, D2-6)
updated: 2026-07-17
---
# Example Wiki

Single-adapter root fixture: this stash contains ONLY a `wikis/` directory,
so the wiki adapter's `looksLikeRoot` must fire here and every sibling
adapter's (skill/script) `looksLikeRoot` must not.
